vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current visual state. P1, P2, and P4 are not identifiable as healthy specimens; they appear as bare soil or dormant/failed substrates. P3 is the only site showing active, albeit minimal, biological activity.

plant_audit.P1: Yellow pot: Empty, dark soil, no signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P2: Black pot: Empty, no signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.P3: Black pot: Contains a single, upright green sprout (likely a seedling or Pothos propagation attempt). White rabbit anchor present.
plant_audit.P4: Black pot: Shared space with P2, no visible plant matter.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp-appearing across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: White granular material (likely perlite or crushed eggshell) present in P3/P4 area.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial observation shows a small green sprout in P3.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_t3: Sprout in P3 remains stable; no growth or decline.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t2: Sprout in P3 shows slight postural shift, leaning slightly.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_t1: Sprout in P3 appears to have straightened slightly.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: Sprout in P3 remains in a vertical, healthy-looking state. No other changes.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: P3 is the only viable site. The sprout shows turgidity and positive phototropism. P1, P2, and P4 are effectively inactive/failed.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of a single sprout in P3 is the only biological anomaly. The registry is significantly misaligned with the current physical reality of the pots.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is currently in a state of near-total dormancy or failure, with the exception of a single, persistent sprout in the P3 pot. The other pots (P1, P2, P4) show no evidence of the registered species, suggesting either total systemic loss or a failure to germinate/establish. The environment is stable, but the lack of foliage suggests a need for re-evaluation of the growth medium or the viability of the initial specimens.
